items.name: caveman
items.hook: "Why use many token when few token do trick." A Claude Code skill that forces caveman-speak output and cuts 65–75% of output tokens with no accuracy loss. Biggest breakout of April.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-04, ~39.9k stars by 2026-04-20. Covered by Yahoo, Decrypt, LinkedIn viral post, Product Hunt, skool.com, multiple Medium tutorials. #1 HN trending.

items.name: career-ops
items.hook: AI-powered job-search OS built on Claude Code — 14 skill modes, Playwright scraping of 45+ career portals, ATS-optimized CV generation, Go dashboard. Creator scored 700+ apps and landed Head of Applied AI.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-04, ~36.7k stars in 16 days. Garry Tan amplified; Product Hunt launch; Aakash Gupta writeup; YouTube creator coverage.

items.name: graphify
items.hook: One skill turns any folder of code/docs/papers/images/video into a queryable knowledge graph. Reported 71x fewer tokens per session. Works with 10+ coding agents.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-03, ~31.1k stars. Anchor of April's Karpathy-LLM-Wiki wave; 5+ Medium writeups, dedicated website, spawned direct copies (llmwiki, karpathy-llm-wiki, LLM-Wiki, swarmvault).

items.name: Claude Opus 4.7
items.hook: New frontier Anthropic model shipped April 16. SWE-bench Verified 87.6%, GPQA Diamond 94.2%, pricing unchanged from 4.6. Default in Claude Code with Auto mode + new xhigh /effort tier for Max subscribers.
items.evidence: Released 2026-04-16 on Platform, Bedrock, Vertex, Microsoft Foundry. Covered by VentureBeat, 9to5Mac, Rolling Out. Triggered CC 2.1.90+ changelog wave (Auto mode, xhigh, /tui, push-notif tool).

items.name: Claude Design (Anthropic Labs)
items.hook: Prompt-to-prototype design surface powered by Opus 4.7, under a new Anthropic Labs sub-brand. Packages output into a handoff bundle that drops into Claude Code with one instruction. Figma stock fell 7.3% same day.
items.evidence: Launched 2026-04-17, day after Opus 4.7. Major design-tool press cycle (TechCrunch, VentureBeat, Fast Company, SiliconAngle). Mike Krieger resigned from Figma's board April 14.

items.name: awesome-persona-distill-skills
items.hook: Curated catalog of persona-distillation Agent Skills — people, relationships, commemorative scenes, and methodological lenses, drop-in for Claude Code and OpenClaw. The April spine of the digital-immortality skill cluster.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-06, ~3.9k stars. Central hub for April's persona-distill wave (immortal-skill, yupi-skill, Master-skill, cyber-figures, forge-skill). 437 forks.

items.name: OpenMythos
items.hook: Theoretical reconstruction of the rumored Claude Mythos architecture (looped transformers, novel attention), built from first principles using public research. Kye Gomez's April mega-drop.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-18, ~3.1k stars in 2 days. Kye Gomez's reach (Agoraverse/Swarms founder) plus ML research interest. 641 forks.

items.name: codeburn
items.hook: Interactive TUI dashboard that shows where your AI coding tokens actually go across Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor. Cost-observability with model/project/session breakdowns.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-13, ~2.97k stars in a week. Opus 4.7 launch raised cost pressure; codeburn caught the wave along with TokenTracker, claude-usage.

items.name: claude-obsidian
items.hook: Claude Code + Obsidian knowledge companion — persistent, compounding wiki vault using Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. Slash commands: /wiki, /save, /autoresearch.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-07, ~2.2k stars. Top Karpathy-LLM-Wiki implementation of the month; paired with claude-code-memory-setup for end-to-end PKM stack.

items.name: design-extract
items.hook: One command extracts a website's full design system — DTCG tokens, semantic+primitive+composite, multi-platform emitters (SwiftUI, Compose, Flutter, WordPress). Ships as MCP server + Chrome extension.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-15, ~1.1k stars. Rode the Claude Design launch wave; cited in design-system skill aggregators (rohitg00, VoltAgent awesome-claude-design).

items.name: claude-usage
items.hook: Local dashboard for Claude Code token usage, costs, and session history. Pro/Max subscribers get a progress bar that the official CLI hides; everyone gets the full picture.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-07, ~1.09k stars. Hit Reddit r/ClaudeAI as the 'show me what /usage hides' tool; consistently shared alongside codeburn.

items.name: soongenwong/claudecode (Rust leak)
items.hook: Post-leak Rust rebuild of Claude Code — April 1 drop. Same functionality, free, runnable on a Max subscription without Anthropic's CLI.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-01, ~994 stars. Part of the April-1 post-leak fork cluster with clawgod, CoreCoder, cheetahclaws, better-clawd.

items.name: paper2code
items.hook: Skill that turns any arXiv paper into a working implementation — reads PDF, extracts method, scaffolds code, runs reproducibility checks. Sibling to PaperOrchestra.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-03, ~958 stars. Extension of March autoresearch wave into paper-reproduction territory; frequently paired with asta-skill, paper-fetch.

items.name: claude-code-prompts (repowise-dev)
items.hook: Independently authored prompt templates for AI coding agents — system prompts, tool prompts, delegation, memory management, multi-agent coordination. Informed by CC but not a leak.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-01, ~947 stars. Becomes the 'clean' alternative to the March 31 source leak — many devs cite it in HN/Reddit threads to avoid the leak repos.

items.name: clawgod
items.hook: Not a third-party CC client — a runtime patch applied on top of the official CLI. Survives CC updates automatically. The April-1 'mod' everyone on Reddit argued about.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-01, ~806 stars. Cross-platform (macOS/Linux/Windows); Reddit discussed it heavily as a usage-limit bypass.

items.name: immortal-skill
items.hook: Open-source digital-immortality framework — distills anyone's seven-dimensional digital twin from chat logs (WeChat, Feishu, iMessage, Telegram, 12+ platforms). Aligns with OpenClaw Soul Spec.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-01, ~604 stars. Anchors the awesome-persona-distill-skills cluster; heavy PRC dev community + Xiaohongshu traction.

items.name: auto-deep-researcher-24x7
items.hook: Autonomous AI agent that runs your deep-learning experiments 24/7 while you sleep. Leader-Worker architecture, constant-size memory, zero-cost monitoring. Logical successor to March's ARIS.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-08, ~595 stars. Continuation of March ARIS/autoresearch wave; frequently listed in ML-research skill roundups.

items.name: antivibe
items.hook: Claude Code skill that turns AI-generated code into educational deep dives. Stop accepting the vibe-coded diff — learn why it works before merging.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-10, ~592 stars. Strong anti-vibe-coding discourse on X/Reddit in April; positioned as the educational counterweight to caveman/velocity skills.

items.name: awesome-claude-design (VoltAgent)
items.hook: 68 ready-to-use design-system inspirations in DESIGN.md format. Drop one in, scaffold a full UI in one shot. Biggest Claude Design companion repo of the launch week.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-18, ~576 stars in 2 days. Rode the Claude Design launch; VoltAgent org brand recognition.

items.name: llmwiki (lucasastorian)
items.hook: Open-source Karpathy LLM Wiki implementation. Upload documents, connect Claude via MCP, have the model write and maintain your wiki. Supabase-backed RAG.
items.install: git clone https://github.com/lucasastorian/llmwiki && pnpm install && pnpm dev
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-04, ~566 stars. Canonical of April's LLM-Wiki wave; cited directly alongside graphify and karpathy-llm-wiki.

items.name: MioIsland
items.hook: macOS Dynamic Island for AI coding agents — monitor, approve, and jump to Claude Code sessions from the notch. Native SwiftUI, menubar + notch.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-01, ~353 stars. Featured in developer-productivity YouTube roundups; one of April's signature Mac-native CC tools.

items.name: ThinkWatch
items.hook: Enterprise AI bastion host for secure API + MCP access. Unified proxying, RBAC, audit logs, rate limiting, cost tracking across OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/self-hosted. Rust.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-02, ~364 stars. Enterprise procurement angle — cited in April's MCP-security threads as the 'gateway' answer.

items.name: evo (evo-hq)
items.hook: Plugin for Claude Code and Codex that turns your codebase into an autoresearch loop — discovers what to measure, instruments a benchmark, runs tree search with parallel subagents.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-05, ~486 stars. Evolutionary-algorithm / autoresearch hybrid for code optimization; one of April's standout cross-vendor plugins.

items.name: my-claude-devteam
items.hook: Engineering team in a box for Claude Code — 12 specialized agents, 15 automation hooks, and the P7/P9/P10 methodology. Spiritual successor to March's gstack vibe.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-11, ~221 stars. Featured in zh/tw dev community threads as the 'post-gstack' opinionated team template; sibling to the-dev-squad, claude-alloy.

items.name: styleseed
items.hook: Claude Code + Cursor design system. 69 design rules + 48 shadcn components + Toss/Stripe/Linear/Vercel/Notion brand skins. Tailwind v4 + Radix. Stop generating ugly AI UI.
items.evidence: Created 2026-04-07, ~305 stars. Rode Claude Design launch + the 'ugly AI UI' meme; consistently paired with hue and design-extract in April roundups.
